analysis.reasoning: Core message: An expression of sorrow and condolences for the victims of the Ukraine International Airlines flight PS752 crash. CH4 (appropriate political system/values) – Not referenced; no discussion of China’s governance or values. CH5 (CCP succeeds) – Not referenced; no development or achievement claims. CH6 (China’s culture/nature/heritage) – Not relevant; no cultural content. Conclusion: The tweet promotes none of the listed narratives.
